# nlqdb

> Natural-language databases. Create one in a word. Query it in English.
> The schema, the engine, the indexes, and the backups stay invisible —
> unless you want to see them.

nlqdb inverts the usual database experience. Instead of choosing a
schema, an engine, and a set of indexes upfront, the user states a goal
in English and the system materializes the database that fits the
workload, migrating engines underneath as the workload evolves.

## Status

Pre-alpha, closed beta.

- Phase 0 (foundations): shipped — Cloudflare Workers API plane,
  authentication, billing webhooks, observability, product-event sink.
- Phase 1 (on-ramp): in progress — Astro marketing site, anonymous
  72-hour mode, magic-link sign-in, embeddable `<nlq-data>` v0.

The source repository is private during pre-alpha.

## Contact

Email: hello@nlqdb.com
